name: Enterprise AI USP Demo Scenarios
positioning: Autonomous Database Operations without autonomous production risk.

scenarios.title: AI strategy roadmap for platform leadership

input.objective: make database operations AI-native for enterprise teams

scenarios.expectedOutcome: roadmap with closed-loop guardrails and AI recommendations

scenarios.title: Unsafe production prompt gets converted into governed dry-run work

input.prompt: Fix production by dropping slow indexes and update all customers

scenarios.title: AI operator stops when evidence is missing
Cross-agent consensus exposes disagreement before recommendation
Board-ready ROI narrative from operating evidence
scenarios.expectedOutcome: executive AI ROI narrative with evidence-bound value signals
